meta.title: SJ Train Search - Find fast train connections in Sweden
meta.description: Search and compare train prices from SJ. Find fast direct trains between Swedish cities.

about.title: Why we do this
about.p1: SJ AB is a state-owned company providing an essential public service. Under the EU Open Data Directive (2019/1024) — implemented in Sweden as law 2022:818 — exactly this kind of mobility and transport data from public bodies should be freely available to the public.
about.p2: We cannot legally compel SJ to open its API today. But we are convinced that we fulfil the directive's intent: that citizens should be able to access and build upon data produced with taxpayer money.
about.p3: What we do is simple: we show the same information as SJ's own website, faster and without unnecessary clicks. We make no money. Booking always happens directly with SJ.
about.p4: In Justin Roczniak's immortal words: "Cars bad — trains good." We fight on the side of the train. SJ's website does not. History has always rewarded those who made it easy to choose right — and we have already won every time someone was spared clicking through four pages to find a train.

search.timeWarning: Note: the search can take up to 30 seconds

validation.invalidDate: Date must be today or in the future
validation.sameCity: From and To must be different cities

results.loadingMessage: This can take up to 30 seconds

results.noTrainsAvailable: No trains available for this route and date.
results.error: An error occurred while fetching train data
results.statsSaved: We saved you from visiting {pages} pages
results.dateInPastMessage: You can't search for trains on a date that has already passed.
results.incompleteSingular: {count} departure could not be fetched due to a timeout or connection problem. Try reloading the page to try again.
results.incompletePlural: {count} departures could not be fetched due to a timeout or connection problem. Try reloading the page to try again.

split.note: Same train the whole way – but you may need to change seats in {station} (separate seat reservations).
split.error: Something went wrong with the split search.
